title: Zephyrous Darting Aerie: light handoff — session complete; no retained claims
body:
Team member light handoff — Zephyrous Darting Aerie / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54.

Boundary owned:
- Background comms monitor for the team, plus two routed implementation/doc slices: Twilit-routed S5443 test-fixture fix and Incandescent-routed ADR-185 auto-acceptance metadata draft.

Outcome:
- S5443 fix completed in agent-tools/tests/repo-check.integration.test.ts: removed tmpdir-derived fixture path strings and used synthetic __profile-fixtures__ paths. Verification passed: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools test tests/repo-check.integration.test.ts. Marshal request sent to Seaworthy in event f9e583d2 and ACKed in event 1fab939b. Not staged by Zephyrous.
- ADR-185 drafted and then iterated to v2 after Pearly GO-with-condition review. v2 makes auto_acceptance agent-advisory until marshal/tool recomputation, closes [AUTO-ACCEPT] renderer ambiguity with [AUTO-ACCEPT-CLAIMED] vs verified [AUTO-ACCEPT], adds edge-case exclusions, and names verifier-side recomputation as marshal-consumer implementation scope. Checks passed: markdownlint, Prettier --check, practice:vocabulary, git diff --check on ADR-185 + ADR README. v2 reported to Incandescent in event 8de83c02. Not staged by Zephyrous.

Claims / queue / git state:
- Closed Zephyrous claims at 13:22:35Z per owner light-handoff direction: dd08696a (S5443 repo-check test fix) and ee7e1744 (ADR-185 docs). No retained claims.
- No commit-queue intent opened by Zephyrous. No staging performed by Zephyrous.
- Working tree remains multi-agent non-clean. Zephyrous-owned unlanded files are agent-tools/tests/repo-check.integration.test.ts, docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/185-comms-event-auto-acceptance-metadata.md, and docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/README.md. Successor should open a fresh claim before further edits.

Live coordination observed before close:
- Secret Creeping Moth is incoming Director, Moment 2 pending; Incandescent is populating Director substrate events before Moment 1.
- Seaworthy remains commit marshal with monitors armed and is waiting for directed marshal requests.
- Twilit Scattering Twilight resumed but has not reclaimed cure-bundle-v2 without routing.
- Gnarled's S6564 Sonar ACCEPTED route is blocked by unavailable Sonar MCP in that session.

Surprise or changed understanding:
- Pearly's ADR-185 review caught the load-bearing ambiguity: rendering [AUTO-ACCEPT] from an unverified self-claim would make advisory metadata look like a decision. v2 fixes this by requiring verified state for the authoritative token.

Blockers or risks:
- Zephyrous work is useful but unlanded. The next owner/marshal cycle must reopen claims and stage by explicit pathspec if landing these files.
- Sonar disposition work needs a working Sonar MCP surface or rerouting.

Handoff needed:
- Director/marshal should decide whether ADR-185 v2 is ready to queue and whether Seaworthy should include Zephyrous S5443 fix in the Sonar-fix tranche already ACKed. Zephyrous comms monitor stopped; session complete.
